data.title: Disney Doubles Down On Cruises With Seven New Ships By 2031, Targets Asian Market Expansion: 'Best Time To Invest In This Business'
data.description: The Walt Disney Co. plans to invest approximately $12 billion in its cruise business over the next decade, aiming to more than double its fleet from six to 13 ships by 2031. The expansion comes as Disney's newest vessel, the Disney Treasure, recently made its debut in New York Harbor

data.title: Palantir's Shyam Sankar Says AI The New Frontier In Defense — Reflects On Possible Pentagon Rule Under Trump As Stock Soars
data.description: Palantir Technologies Inc. Chief Technology Officer Shyam Sankar highlighted the critical role of artificial intelligence in national defense and outlined the company's vision for rebuilding America's industrial base during a CNBC "Closing Bell Overtime" appearance on Saturday Dec, 7, 2024.

data.title: TikTok-Parent ByteDance, Now Nvidia's Largest Asian Chip Customer, Races Ahead Of Alibaba And Baidu To Dominate China's Generative AI Market: Report
data.description: ByteDance, TikTok's parent company, has emerged as Nvidia's largest chip buyer in Asia, surpassing Alibaba and Baidu, as it aggressively invests in AI infrastructure and talent to dominate China's generative AI market amidst U.S. restrictions and a potential TikTok ban.

data.title: Amazon Shareholders Propose Adding Bitcoin To Treasury For 'Best' Long-Term Interest, Cite Michael Saylor's MicroStrategy As Example
data.description: Following in the footsteps of other Wall Street giants, shareholders of online retail giant Amazon.com Inc. (NASDAQ:AMZN) urged the firm Sunday to consider a Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) treasury strategy to enhance shareholder va

data.title: Musk-Altman Rivalry Intensifies With Trump's Appointment of David Sacks
data.description: The recent appointment of David Sacks as the "White House A.I. and Crypto Czar" by President-elect Donald Trump has sparked a new chapter in the ongoing rivalry between billionaire Elon Musk and Sam Altman, head of OpenAI.
